newFeatures: Full migration to TypeScript — improved type safety and code reliability
Added soft delete with undo, restore, and permanent delete capabilities
Added incremental loading for faster archive list display
improvements: Removed plugin system, feedback service, and seasonal themes — leaner core
Removed redundant SkeletonLoader and PageSkeleton components for reduced bundle size
Cleaned up unused i18n translation files and JS-only implementation files
Optimized QuickCreateArchive flow — reduced bundle size by 2 KB
Improved delete undo UX — extended undo window to ~11 seconds for safer recovery
Enhanced permanent delete timing — timer now starts after toast closes
bugFixes: Fixed QuickCreateArchive crash from orphaned draft function references
Fixed missing delete animation caused by removed data-archive-id attribute
Fixed ErrorBoundary key collision across same-name routes with different query parameters
performance: Reduced total JS bundle size through dead code elimination
Optimized virtual scroll rendering and animation performance
Streamlined dependency tree by removing unused packages
